news.summary: On June 3, a gala will be held to honor leaders in the fields of innovation, policy, and research in artificial intelligence (AI). The event will feature notable individuals such as Senator Todd Young, Congressmen Jay Obernolte and Ted Lieu, Vice Admiral Frank Whitworth, SandboxAQ CEO Jack Hidary, and the Vatican's Adviser on AI Ethics. The gala is set to take place in Washington and is scheduled for May 29.
news.headline: AI network in Washington to celebrate inaugural AI Honors on June 3. Honorees include Senator Todd Young, Congressmen Jay Obernolte and Ted Lieu, Vice Admiral Frank Whitworth, SandboxAQ CEO Jack Hidary, and Vatican's Adviser on AI Ethics.

news.summary: This updated article clarifies EQTY Lab's partnership with Intel and NVIDIA. Dr. Leemon Baird, co-founder of Hedera (CRYPTO: HBAR), believes artificial intelligence will speed up blockchain adoption by allowing non-technical users to develop easily. Baird predicts that "everything valuable in the world" will be tokenized within five years. During an interview with Benzinga at Consensus 2025, Baird mentioned the challenges of building AI systems and introduced AI Studio as a solution to simplify the process. Hedera's AI Studio collaborates with Eliza OS and includes an MCP server and SDK to democratize blockchain development and address security concerns. For the full story, visit the article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Hedera co-founder predicts tokenization of everything valuable in 5 years, leveraging AI for blockchain accessibility.

news.summary: Cerity Partners recently entered the Scottsdale market by welcoming Chad Wing and Dustin Brutton to their team, further strengthening the firm's capacity to cater to clients in the region. This move signifies Cerity Partners' commitment to expanding their services for individuals and businesses in Scottsdale. As of May 29, 2025, the firm has solidified its presence in the market, bolstering its position as a prominent independent wealth management firm in the U.S.
news.headline: Cerity Partners expands to Arizona with Chad Wing and Dustin Brutton, serving individuals and businesses. Market reach in Scottsdale.

The gold-backed stablecoin USDKG, supported by Kyrgyzstan, plans to become the country's legal tender. USDKG ensures the stability of daily transactions by anchoring the US dollar rather than the gold price, backed by real vault reserves, and backed by the government to provide trust.

Banco Santander SA is mulling an expansion in digital assets, including early-stage plans to offer a stablecoin as well as access to cryptocurrencies for retail clients of its digital bank, as European lenders push deeper into the sector. -- BBG

news.summary: Metronet, a leading internet service provider, revealed plans to introduce their 100% fiber-optic internet service in Peoria, Arizona. Renowned as the "Fastest Major ISP" for two consecutive years by PCMag, Metronet aims to enhance high-speed connectivity throughout the state. In a significant move, they will invest $58.5 million to establish a cutting-edge fiber infrastructure in Peoria. This infrastructure will offer speeds of up to five gigabits per second for residential properties and ten gigabits per second for businesses.
news.headline: Metronet invests $58.5 million to bring 100% fiber internet to Peoria, Arizona, with speeds up to 5 Gbps for homes.

news.summary: Dublin - A report titled "Wi-Fi 7 Market Forecast to 2030" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Wi-Fi 7 Market had a value of USD 1.3 Billion in 2025 and is forecasted to reach USD 22.9 Billion by 2030, demonstrating a notable Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 61.5%. This comprehensive report presents an analysis of the global Wi-Fi 7 market, highlighting market trends and projections. It encompasses global revenue data in millions of dollars for the base year 2024, estimates for 2025, and anticipated CAGRs from 2025 to 2030.
news.headline: Wi-Fi 7 market forecasted to reach $22.9 billion by 2030 from $1.3 billion in 2025, growing at CAGR of 61.5% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: The Artist Discovery Program is set to feature the unique artworks of Caribbean artists during a family vacation in Miami. Scheduled for May 29, 2025, this initiative aims to highlight the rich culture and talent of the region. Showcasing locally inspired pieces, the program will offer guests a glimpse into the vibrant art scene of the Caribbean. Royal's ultimate vacation experience will immerse visitors in the creativity and traditions of the area, giving them the opportunity to explore and appreciate the artistic heritage of the Caribbean.
news.headline: Royal Caribbean has selected the next cohort of local Caribbean artists to feature on Star of the Seas, showcasing their artworks on family vacations. Characters: 100

news.summary: Singapore, on May 29, 2025 - HTX DAO and HTX Ventures, key components of the HTX ecosystem, recently joined Bitcoin 2025, a top-notch Bitcoin summit in Las Vegas. At the event, they collaborated with prominent figures in the cryptocurrency realm to analyze the upcoming trends in Bitcoin. This joint effort signifies a significant step towards the progress of cryptocurrencies, as it brings together minds from varying backgrounds to delve into the potential of Bitcoin.
news.headline: HTX DAO and HTX Ventures participated in Bitcoin 2025 summit in Las Vegas, exploring future of Bitcoin ecosystem.

news.summary: In May 29th, 2025, it was reported that the predicted global Footwear Market size is estimated at USD 457.09 billion by 2024 and is expected to increase to USD 588.22 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.3%. This information was provided by The Research Insights. The report also highlighted significant growth drivers within the global footwear industry.
news.headline: Global footwear market projected to reach $588.22 billion by 2030 with a CAGR of 4.3%. Trends analyzed by The Research Insights.

news.summary: The global Thyristor and IGCT market was valued at USD 2.1 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach approximately USD 3.5 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 5.3% during the forecast period. The growth is attributed to increasing demand for high-efficiency power conversion systems, driven by advancements in wide-bandgap semiconductor technologies. The largest regional market is Asia-Pacific with around 42% revenue share in 2024. The market is segmented by type, application, voltage rating, end-user, technology, and distribution channel. Key growth drivers include rising demand for power efficiency, renewable energy integration, advances in semiconductor materials like SiC and GaN, and electrification of transport. Government regulations promoting carbon reduction goals are also boosting the market. Market restraints include high upfront costs, supply chain disruptions, and regulatory complexity. Opportunities and trends include the growth of electric vehicles presenting significant opportunities for manufacturers of Thyristor and IGCT devices.
news.headline: Global Thyristor and IGCT market valued at USD 2.1 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 3.5 billion by 2034 with a 5.3% CAGR. Asia-Pacific holds the largest market share at approximately 42% in 2024. Key growth segments include Silicon Controlled Rectifiers (SCR) with a 50% market share, Industrial Drives with a 25% share, and Low Voltage applications with a 40% market share. Silicon-Based Devices are dominant due to maturity and cost-effectiveness, while Silicon Carbide (SiC) is rapidly growing due to superior performance in high-temperature and high-voltage environments.<>();

news.summary: The expanded beam fiber optic connectors market is set to grow from USD 2.5 billion in 2024 to around USD 4.1 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 5.1% during 2025–2034. This growth is driven by increased demand in areas like telecommunications, data centers, military and aerospace, and industrial applications, due to ongoing investments in high-speed internet, 5G infrastructure, and the Internet of Things (IoT). North America holds the largest market share (~45%), while Asia-Pacific is the fastest-growing region with a CAGR of around 9%. Data centers account for ~30% of the market share, military and aerospace for ~20%, telecommunications for ~25%, industrial and manufacturing for ~10%, medical for ~5%, and transportation for ~10%. Key growth drivers include 5G network deployment, IoT device proliferation, and the expansion of cloud computing and hyperscale data centers. Challenges include high initial capital investment, competition from traditional connectors, and vulnerability in the supply chain. Opportunities lie in innovation for ruggedized and miniaturized connectors, as well as the development of smart cities with advanced infrastructure requiring high-speed connectivity solutions.
news.headline: Expanded Beam Fiber Optic Connectors market set to reach USD 4.1 billion by 2034, growing at 5.1% CAGR driven by telecom, data centers, military, and industrial sectors. Market was USD 2.5 billion in 2024, with North America leading at 45% share. Asia-Pacific anticipates the fastest growth at 9%.

news.summary: The global dairy alternatives market is projected to reach approximately USD 32 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.7%, reaching around USD 60 billion by 2034. This growth is driven by factors like increasing adoption of plant-based diets, rising consumer awareness of lactose intolerance, and environmental sustainability concerns. Key product types include almond, soy, oat, coconut, rice, cashew, and other milk alternatives. In terms of segmentation, almond and soy milk hold a significant market share, with oat milk gaining momentum. Organic products account for around 40% of the market, while flavored variants hold about 35% market share. Tetra packs lead packaging types with a 50% market share, and online retail is a key distribution channel with about 30% market share. The North America region dominates with a 42% market share in 2024, driven by health consciousness, strong retail infrastructure, brand innovation, and celebrity advocacy. Europe follows with a 32% market share in 2024, led by vegan and flexitarian lifestyles, government support, retail growth, and sustainability awareness. Asia-Pacific holds an 18% market share, driven by cultural acceptance, rising income, urbanization, and health trends. Latin America and Middle East & Africa are seen as emerging markets with growth potential due to youth-driven demand, influence of global food trends, expanding product availability, rising health awareness, and high youth demographics. The future outlook includes strong growth in Europe, especially in Germany, France, and the Nordic countries, while Asia-Pacific is expected to be the fastest-growing region with major opportunities in India, China, and Southeast Asia. Brazil and Mexico are anticipated to lead the expansion in Latin America, and MEA regions are focusing on promoting health awareness and healthier food options.
news.headline: Global dairy alternatives market to reach USD 60 billion by 2034, from USD 32 billion in 2024, with 6.7% CAGR growth, driven by plant-based diets and sustainability concerns. Organic segment holds ~40% share and almond/soy milk dominate with 60%. Online retail accounts for 30% distribution share. North America leads with 42% market share in 2024, Europe at 32%, Asia-Pacific at 18%. Asia-Pacific expected to be the fastest-growing region with opportunities in India, China, Southeast Asia. Latin America and Middle East & Africa are emerging markets with potential for growth.

news.summary: The HERO Grant Program has allocated funding for training, equipment, and new technology to assist in responding to weather-related disasters. This initiative is benefiting 38 nonprofits and government agencies within South Carolina. The city of Greenville was chosen as the location for the announcement made on May 29, 2025. As the hurricane season commences, these resources will support communities in improving their disaster response capabilities.
news.headline: Duke Energy donates $500,000 for emergency preparedness in South Carolina. Funds aid 38 groups with training and tech.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, as of May 29, 2025, the precision fermentation ingredients market is valued at approximately USD 5.02 billion. Forecasts project a significant growth, with an expected rise to USD 36.31 billion by 2030, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 48.6% from 2025 to 2030. These findings come from a recent report released by MarketsandMarkets™.
news.headline: Precision fermentation ingredients market projected to reach $36.31 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 48.6% from 2025.

"senior Israeli political official": Contrary to reports, the Witkoff Agreement proposed in recent days did not determine the new deployment line of our forces, nor the manner in which aid would be distributed within the framework of a ceasefire.

news.summary: Paladin has launched a new cloud mining platform, PaladinMining, aiming to democratize access to cryptocurrency mining by offering a "Hashrate as a Service" model. This cloud-native solution eliminates the need for hardware investment, providing users with computing power rights instantly upon contract signing. Registration offers a $15 bonus, with daily earnings upon signing in. The platform supports multiple cryptocurrencies for recharge and withdrawal, and offers an intuitive interface suitable for all levels of users. Its launch marks a shift towards making mining more accessible to millions, with plans for a "Computing Power Notarization Plan" to verify cloud computing power authenticity. PaladinMining aims to cater to both novice and experienced investors, providing a streamlined and profitable mining experience from day one.
news.headline: Paladin announces cloud mining platform, PaladinMining, offering $15 registration bonus, zero hardware investment, and daily income.

news.summary: The President of Kazakhstan has revealed intentions to construct a specialized zone named "CryptoCity" to serve as a testing ground for utilizing cryptocurrency in transactions. This initiative seeks to create a regulatory sandbox for digital assets and promote innovation in the sector.
news.headline: Kazakhstan to test ‘CryptoCity’ for crypto payments, establishing a regulatory sandbox; president aims to boost adoption.

news.summary: New data shows that the U.S. economy is contracting, with important figures pointing towards this trend. Despite this, there has been no impact on the Bitcoin and cryptocurrency market, which continues to hold steady.
news.headline: US economy saw a decline in Q1 while Bitcoin and crypto market stay stable despite new data.

news.summary: In Dallas, ISN, a worldwide provider of contractor and supplier information management services, has marked a significant achievement by conducting over 2,500 RAVS 360 assessments in the current year. The RAVS 360 assessment program assists contractor clients in recognizing deficiencies in safety practices, workforce education, and health, safety, and environmental (HSE) regulations. It offers concrete steps to enhance safety standards on various work sites. This milestone comes after a decade of pinpointing areas for enhancement in contractor HSE training and protocols through ISN.
news.headline: ISN celebrates milestone: 2,500 RAVS 360 assessments completed, aiding in identifying safety gaps for contractors.

news.summary: Caleres, Inc. (NYSE: CAL) saw its shares decline following the release of its first-quarter FY25 financial results. The company reported a 6.8% decrease in revenues compared to the previous year, totaling $614.2 million, which fell short of the analyst consensus of $622.05 million. Sales at Famous Footwear dropped by 6.3% year over year, with comparable store sales down 4.6%. Brand Portfolio sales also decreased by 6.9% during the quarter. The company's gross margin rate experienced a 150 basis point contraction to 45.4%, and adjusted EBITDA decreased to $28.7 million from $57.4 million in the same quarter last year. The adjusted earnings per share were 22 cents, missing the consensus of 36 cents. Jay Schmidt, the president and CEO of the company...
news.headline: Caleres, Inc. reports Q1 FY25 revenues of $614.2M, a 6.8% decrease YoY, causing stock to plunge after missing analyst consensus.
Ripple USD (RLUSD), a U.S. dollar-pegged stablecoin issued by Ripple, has been officially listed on Bitget's spot trading platform.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, in Los Angeles, Julieanne O'Connor, a co-founder of Influential Dental known for her impactful contributions to dental leadership and mindset, was acknowledged by New York Weekly as one of the "Top 30 Influential Women Entrepreneurs to Watch Out For in 2025." This recognition highlights O'Connor's significant influence in the entrepreneurial sphere.
news.headline: Julieanne O'Connor, co-founder of Influential Dental, named among New York Weekly's Top 30 Influential Women Entrepreneurs for 2025.

news.summary: The green hydrogen market is experiencing rapid growth, with a value of $2.5 billion in 2024 expected to reach $12 billion by 2034, showing a CAGR of 16.5% from 2025 to 2034. The market is driven by escalating energy demands, climate policies, and technological advancements. Green hydrogen is being adopted in various sectors to decarbonize and replace fossil fuels. The market is segmented by production technology, application, end-user industry, capacity, type, and region. Electrolysis, especially Proton Exchange Membrane (PEM) electrolysis, is the dominant production method. The industrial sector holds the largest market share, with the Asia-Pacific region dominating at 45%. Growth drivers include increasing demand for clean energy, technological improvements, government support, and rising fossil fuel prices. Challenges include high costs and regulatory inconsistencies, while opportunities lie in emerging applications and advanced storage technologies. Key players in the market include Nel ASA, ITM Power, and Plug Power.
news.headline: Green hydrogen market to grow to $12 billion by 2034, with a 16.5% CAGR from $2.5 billion in 2024, driven by clean energy demand and technological advancements. Key market drivers include rising energy costs, climate change awareness, and government policies favoring renewable energy transitions. Production technology, application, end-user industry, capacity, and type are key market segments. Asia-Pacific leads with 45% market share, North America holds 25%, and Europe 20%. Major companies include Nel, ITM Power, Plug Power, Ballard Power Systems, and Siemens Energy. Opportunities lie in residential heating, fuel cell vehicles, advanced storage technologies, and green financing. Challenges include high capital costs, underdeveloped supply chain, pricing competition, and regulatory inconsistencies.

news.summary: The global next-generation batteries market was valued at about $9.2 billion in 2024, and is expected to reach $28.7 billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 12.2% from 2025 to 2034. This growth is driven by rising demand for advanced energy storage solutions, particularly from the electric vehicle and renewable energy sectors. Market segmentation includes product types like Lithium-Sulfur Batteries, Sodium-Ion Batteries, and Solid-State Batteries, among others. Regionally, Asia-Pacific dominates with about 45% market share in 2024, followed by North America and Europe. Growth drivers include the rapid adoption of EVs and clean energy technologies, technological advancements in battery chemistry, increasing government investments, and consumer demand for energy independence. Challenges involve supply chain issues, high costs of emerging technologies, regulatory compliance, and the need for significant R&D investments. Opportunities exist in expanding into emerging battery technologies and the growing energy storage market beyond automotive applications.
news.headline: Global next-generation batteries market valued at $9.2 billion in 2024, projected to reach $28.7 billion by 2034 with 12.2% CAGR growth driven by demand from electric vehicles and renewable energy storage applications.

news.summary: The global Automotive Suspension Shock Absorber Market is expected to grow from USD 31.5 billion in 2024 to USD 45.2 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 4.0%. This growth is driven by increasing consumer demand for comfort, safety, and performance in vehicles, along with technological advancements in adaptive damping systems. The rise in electric vehicle production, aftermarket customization trends, and developments in smart suspension technologies are also contributing to the market expansion. Challenges include rising raw material costs, supply chain disruptions, regulatory pressures on emissions, and price competition. Opportunities lie in the aftermarket customization sector, technological innovations in lightweight composites and magnetorheological systems, rising investment in ADAS and smart vehicle technologies, and the demand for premium shock absorbers in luxury and performance vehicle segments.
news.headline: Automotive suspension shock absorber market to hit $45.2B by 2034, up from $31.5B in 2024, growing at 4.0% CAGR, driven by rising demand for comfort, EV production surge, smart tech advancements.

news.summary: The vehicle-to-grid (V2G) market is set to grow significantly at a CAGR of 30.2% between 2025 and 2033, reaching a valuation of over USD 109.94 billion by 2033 from USD 7.37 billion in 2025. V2G facilitates bi-directional energy exchange between electric vehicles (EVs) and the power grid, leveraging EV batteries for grid support during peak demand. Factors driving market growth include smart grid deployment, EV adoption, and concerns about energy sustainability. Challenges such as infrastructure limitations hinder widespread adoption. Market segments include solution types (hardware, software, services), vehicle types, charging types (bidirectional, smart, unidirectional), applications, end users, and regions. Plug-in Hybrid Electric Vehicles (PHEVs) dominate the vehicle segment, with bidirectional charging emerging as a growth area. North America leads V2G adoption, followed by Europe and Asia-Pacific. Key players in the market include Nissan, Tesla, Enel X, ABB, BMW, and Honda.
news.headline: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) market expected to reach $109.94 billion by 2033 with a 30.2% CAGR, bolstered by EV adoption and smart grids' development.
BTC = 1 wk low

news.summary: In San Francisco, ClickHouse, Inc., a prominent company in real-time analytics and AI/ML, unveiled securing $350 million in Series C funding. The funding round was spearheaded by Khosla Ventures and saw contribution from new investors like BOND, IVP, Battery Ventures, and Bessemer Venture Partners, along with existing ones such as Index Ventures, Lightspeed, GIC, Benchmark, Coatue, FirstMark, and Nebius. This latest round builds on previous investments exceeding $300 million.
news.headline: ClickHouse secures $350M in Series C funding from Khosla Ventures, BOND, IVP, Battery Ventures, and others for analytics.

news.summary: The Royal Canadian Mint has released its financial results for Q1 of 2025, detailing its performance amidst global economic uncertainties and trade barriers. Marie Lemay, President and CEO, highlighted the challenges faced, emphasizing efforts to mitigate the impact of U.S. tariffs and market volatility. The Mint's strategic response aims to ensure resilience moving forward. More information can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Royal Canadian Mint announces Q1 2025 financial results amidst economic uncertainties. CEO mentions response to U.S. tariffs.

news.summary: PPG, based in Pittsburgh, has recently announced that its internal tools for measuring product carbon footprints from cradle-to-gate and conducting life cycle assessments have been officially validated according to ISO standards. This validation highlights PPG's commitment to ensuring accurate and standardized measurements regarding sustainability.
news.headline: PPG becomes first U.S.-based coatings company certified for environmental impact measurement tools and processes.

news.summary: The global Open Source Intelligence (OSINT) market was valued at USD 8.69 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow to USD 46.12 billion by 2034 at a CAGR of 18.01%. The market is driven by the increasing demand for real-time data analytics and the rising adoption of OSINT tools by government agencies and private enterprises. The market is dominated by the Media segment, with Big Data software being the leading technology. Government intelligence agencies are the main consumers of OSINT, with cybersecurity being the largest application area. In North America, the OSINT market is led by the United States with key players like Palantir Technologies and Recorded Future. In Europe, the focus is on national security and regulatory compliance, with the UK, Germany, France, and Italy being key countries. The APAC region is the fastest-growing, with China, India, Japan, South Korea, and Australia leading in market share due to rising geopolitical tensions and government digitization. Major players in the OSINT market include Thales Group, BAE Systems, Palantir Technologies, and Recorded Future.
news.headline: Global OSINT market valued at USD 8.69 billion in 2024, projected to reach USD 46.12 billion by 2034 with 18.01% CAGR. North America leads in key OSINT market share, with major players like Palantir Technologies, Recorded Future, and Dataminr. APAC region is the fastest-growing market segment due to rising geopolitical tensions and government digitization efforts. Market driven by demand for real-time data analytics and increasing cyber threats. Major applications include cybersecurity and law enforcement.(MediaType and Big Data technologies are dominant segments. Cloud-based deployment mode most prevalent)

news.summary: The global pathology devices market is estimated to reach approximately $27.2 billion by 2034, with a CAGR of 6.0% from $15.6 billion in 2024. Factors contributing to this growth include increasing chronic diseases, technological advancements like digital pathology and AI integration, and rising healthcare spending globally. The market is segmented by product type, technology, application, end user, and distribution channel. North America leads with 40% market share, followed by Europe at about 30% and Asia-Pacific as the fastest-growing region with a projected CAGR of 8%. Pathology devices play a crucial role in disease diagnosis and monitoring, with advances in digital pathology and AI improving diagnostic precision. However, challenges include stringent regulatory approval processes, supply chain disruptions, pricing pressures, and barriers to AI adoption. Opportunities in the market include personalized medicine and precision diagnostics, as well as growth in telemedicine and remote diagnostics.
news.headline: Global pathology devices market set to reach $27.2 billion by 2034, growing at a 6.0% CAGR driven by chronic disease prevalence, digital pathology, AI integration, and increased healthcare spending worldwide. North America leads with 40% market share, Europe at 30%, and Asia-Pacific growing fastest at 8%. Major challenges include regulatory approval processes, supply chain disruptions, pricing pressures, and AI adoption barriers. Opportunities lie in personalized medicine and telemedicine growth.

news.summary: The global fumed silica market was valued at USD 1.56 billion in 2024, expected to reach around USD 2.57 billion by 2034, growing at a CAGR of 5.13% from 2025 to 2034. The market is driven by the demand for high-performance parts in the marine & transportation industry. Fumed silica is used in various applications like coatings, adhesives, personal care, pharmaceuticals, food, and more. It is classified into hydrophilic and hydrophobic types. The hydrophilic segment dominates the market. Key application sectors include paints and coatings, adhesives, pharmaceuticals, personal care, food, and gel batteries. The market is segmented by region with Asia Pacific being the largest market, followed by North America, Europe, Latin America, and the Middle East & Africa. The hydrophobic segment is expected to witness the highest growth rate due to its water-repellent properties. The automotive industry's demand for lightweight and efficient coatings is also driving the market growth.
news.headline: Global fumed silica market size was USD 1.56B in 2024, expected to reach USD 2.57B by 2034 with CAGR of 5.13%. Increased demand from marine & transportation industry driving growth. Market offers hydrophilic and hydrophobic fumed silica for various applications like coatings, rubber, pharmaceuticals, and more across industries like automotive, construction, electronics, and healthcare. Market segmented by type, application, end-use industry, and region. Asia Pacific leads market. Insights by Exactitude Consultancy.

news.summary: The latest valuation of Tembo e-LV stands at US$200 million for a majority stake of 51%, marking an increase compared to the prior valuation of US$180 million offered for an 80% share of the unaffiliated VivoPower shares.
news.headline: VivoPower gets new US$200M proposal for 51% of Tembo e-LV, a bump from previous US$180M offer for 80% of shares.

The funding round was oversubscribed and led by Union Square Ventures, renowned for their early investments in innovative ventures.
news.headline: Volteras secures $11.1M in Series A funding to revolutionize energy and mobility data with Union Square Ventures.

news.headline: Global Electronic Lab Notebook Market to reach US$1.03 billion by 2030 with 7.3% CAGR per MarketsandMarkets™.

news.summary: Registration for the 2025 Conference and Convention organized by the American Council of the Blind (ACB) in Alexandria, Va., will begin from June 23 and the in-person segment is set to run from July 4 to 11 at the Hyatt Regency Hotel. The event will last for a total of 19 days, marking a significant gathering for members and supporters of the organization.
news.headline: ACB opens registration for 2025 Conference & Convention, happening June 23 to July 11, with in-person part on July 4-11 at Hyatt Regency.

news.summary: Allegheny Health Network experienced a substantial 10% increase in revenue, achieving an $8 million operating income, and saw a significant year-over-year EBITDA growth. Concurrently, Highmark Health Plans recorded a 12% increase in revenue, but faced a $9 million operating loss due to higher medical costs in the industry. In addition, the diversified businesses within the network reported more than...
news.headline: Highmark Health revenue up 11% to $8B, $13M net income in Q1 2025. AHN sees 10% revenue growth, $8M income. Highmark Health Plans up 12%, $9M loss due to medical costs.

news.summary: In a major development on May 29, 2025, in Hyderabad, India, and Vancouver, BC, Mapmygenome, a top player in genomics and personalized health utilizing AI technology, revealed its acquisition of Microbiome Insights, a renowned global expert in microbial sequencing. The strategic acquisition encompasses all assets associated with Microbiome Insights, establishing Mapmygenome's prominence in the field.
news.headline: Mapmygenome acquires Canada's Microbiome Insights, reinforcing global genomics leadership.

China launches the Tianwen-2 probe on a decade-long mission to collect asteroid samples and explore a rare comet-like object. The mission could unlock secrets of the early solar system and test deep-space tech. Beijing hopes the decade-long voyage will yield ‘cosmic fossils’ and
